compressed_prompt: Draft 7-day itineraries for India and China, tabulating them separately, with 6 asterisks ******* in between.
response:
# 7-Day India Itinerary

| Day | Location | Activities & Highlights |
|-----|----------|------------------------|
| **Day 1** | **New Delhi** | Arrive in Delhi · Visit India Gate · Explore Rajpath · Check into hotel · Welcome dinner with local cuisine |
| **Day 2** | **New Delhi** | Red Fort · Jama Masjid · Chandni Chowk street food tour · Humayun's Tomb · Qutub Minar |
| **Day 3** | **Agra** | Train to Agra · Sunrise visit to Taj Mahal · Agra Fort · Mehtab Bagh · Local handicraft shopping |
| **Day 4** | **Jaipur** | Drive to Jaipur · Amber Fort · Jal Mahal · City Palace · Jantar Mantar observatory |
| **Day 5** | **Jaipur** | Hawa Mahal · Johari Bazaar shopping · Elephant Village visit · Traditional Rajasthani dinner |
| **Day 6** | **Mumbai** | Fly to Mumbai · Gateway of India · Elephanta Caves · Marine Drive evening stroll |
| **Day 7** | **Mumbai** | Dharavi tour · Dhobi Ghat · Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus · Colaba Causeway · Departure |

---

*******

# 7-Day China Itinerary

| Day | Location | Activities & Highlights |
|-----|----------|------------------------|
| **Day 1** | **Beijing** | Arrive in Beijing · Tiananmen Square · Check into hotel · Peking duck dinner |
| **Day 2** | **Beijing** | Forbidden City · Jingshan Park · Temple of Heaven · Evening acrobatics show |
| **Day 3** | **Beijing** | Great Wall at Mutianyu · Ming Tombs · Summer Palace · Night market exploration |
| **Day 4** | **Xi'an** | High-speed train to Xi'an · Terracotta Army · Huaqing Hot Springs · Muslim Quarter food street |
| **Day 5** | **Xi'an** | Ancient City Wall cycling · Big Wild Goose Pagoda · Shaanxi History Museum · Tang Dynasty show |
| **Day 6** | **Shanghai** | Fly to Shanghai · The Bund waterfront · Yu Garden · Nanjing Road shopping |
| **Day 7** | **Shanghai** | French Concession · Xintiandi · Shanghai Tower observation deck · Farewell dinner · Departure |
